Checklist for ADS Group  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/RrvNbvb1u1JDTPXQWdkDC/ae6be2b8d73a1cfcd5951d62b61bbc0a/Checklist-for-ADS-Group.pdf)                                                                    
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/est/travel-insurance)
visa_types.visa_fees:
Application fees applicable for May 2026:

[Table:ADS Group]
Service charge:

[Table:ADS Group]
*Please note that the service fee is inclusive of tax
Exemption of Visa Fee:
- Children under 6 years.
- A family member of an Estonian or an EU/ EEA citizen of a third country whose nationals are required to hold a visa for the Schengen area.
- Persons who intend to attend meetings of the United Nations or its organizations, the Council of Europe, the European Union or the Organization for Security and Cooperation in Europe to be held in Estonia.
- School children, students, post-graduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake trips for the purpose only of study or educational training.
- Researchers coming from third countries travelling in the Community for conducting scientific research with a view to facilitating proceedings carried out by Member States for issuing uniform short -stay visas.
- Persons invited by Parliament or the Estonian Government.
- Anyone who, by virtue of an international convention, is entitled to a visa free of charge. Representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organizations.
- Holders of diplomatic and service passports
- According to Visa Facilitation Agreements (http://www.vm.ee/en/taxonomy/term/161%20)
Please Note:
The applicable visa fee in CNY is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.

                                                                        the applicant (except with the invitation or note from Chinese Embassy) should submit the reservation of flight.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
It is applicable in case you are travelling for taking part in ADS events. This visa is given for a period of the stay up to 90 days within 180 days.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
It is applicable in case you are travelling for taking part in ADS events. This visa is given for a period of the stay up to 90 days within 180 days.

## Visa Fees
Application fees applicable for May 2026:

[Table:ADS Group]
Service charge:

[Table:ADS Group]
*Please note that the service fee is inclusive of tax
Exemption of Visa Fee:
- Children under 6 years.
- A family member of an Estonian or an EU/ EEA citizen of a third country whose nationals are required to hold a visa for the Schengen area.
- Persons who intend to attend meetings of the United Nations or its organizations, the Council of Europe, the European Union or the Organization for Security and Cooperation in Europe to be held in Estonia.
- School children, students, post-graduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake trips for the purpose only of study or educational training.
- Researchers coming from third countries travelling in the Community for conducting scientific research with a view to facilitating proceedings carried out by Member States for issuing uniform short -stay visas.
- Persons invited by Parliament or the Estonian Government.
- Anyone who, by virtue of an international convention, is entitled to a visa free of charge. Representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organizations.
- Holders of diplomatic and service passports
- According to Visa Facilitation Agreements (http://www.vm.ee/en/taxonomy/term/161%20)
Please Note:
The applicable visa fee in CNY is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice. 

## Documents Required
Checklist for ADS Group  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/RrvNbvb1u1JDTPXQWdkDC/ae6be2b8d73a1cfcd5951d62b61bbc0a/Checklist-for-ADS-Group.pdf)                                                                    
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/est/travel-insurance)

## Photo Specifications
All photos must meet the requirements listed below. If these requirements have not been met, the applicant will have to deliver a new photo that meets the requirements. The photo requirements
                                                                        are the same for children as for adults.

## The Photo shall:
- be in sharp focus, clear and with good contrasts
- be printed on quality photo paper with high solution
- be in colours with a light background
- be 35-45 mm in width
- maximum 6 months old, resemble the applicant
- full-face, facing the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- show the whole head and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80 % of the picture
- show open eyes that are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes

## Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot be coloured
- the rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be reflection in the glasses

## Regarding head-dress:
Religious head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly shown.
- Chin, forehead and both cheeks shall all be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face due to the head-dress are not allowed

## Processing Time
Normally，processing time for visa applications is within 15 calendar days (delivery time should be deducted), if the submitting date is less than 15 days before the date of departure,
                                                                        the applicant (except with the invitation or note from Chinese Embassy) should submit the reservation of flight.

## Download Forms
Authorization letter (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2CGEnui8ZM7gCoS7PJzcEl/2ddc5c2d53b979d8538de5c141ffeaef/AuthorisationLetter.pdf)
- According to the Personal Information Protection Law of the People’s Republic of China and other applicable laws and regulations to protect your personal information, VFS Global must obtain the consent from you for the processing of your personal data and proceed with your visa application. Please download, print, fill, sign and submit the consent form along with your visa application form, without which we will not be able to proceed with the application lodgment. Click
here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/est/apply-visa)

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
It is applicable in case you are travelling for transit. It is issued for passing through the international transit area.s of airports situated on the territory of the Member States. This
                                                                        visa is given for a period of the stay up to 90 days within 180 days.
Common list of third countries listed to Regulation (EC) No 539/2001, whose nationals are required to be in possession of an airport transit visa when passing through the international
                                                                        transit area. of airports situated on the territory of the Member States.
- AFGHANISTAN
- BANGLADESH
- DEMOCRATIC REPUBLIC OF THE CONGO
- ERITREA
- ETHIOPIA
- GHANA
- IRAN
- IRAQ
- NIGERIA
- PAKISTAN
- SOMALIA
- SRI LANKA

visa_types.overview:
Overview
It is applicable in case you are travelling for tourism. This visa is given for a period of the stay up to 90 days within 180 days.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
It is applicable in case you are travelling for tourism. This visa is given for a period of the stay up to 90 days within 180 days.

## Visa Fees
Application fees applicable for May 2026:

[Table:Individual Tourism]
Service charge:

[Table:Individual Tourism]
*Please note that the service fee is inclusive of tax
Exemption of Visa Fee:
- Children under 6 years.
- A family member of an Estonian or an EU/ EEA citizen of a third country whose nationals are required to hold a visa for the Schengen area.
- Persons who intend to attend meetings of the United Nations or its organizations, the Council of Europe, the European Union or the Organization for Security and Cooperation in Europe to be held in Estonia.
- School children, students, post-graduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake trips for the purpose only of study or educational training.
- Researchers coming from third countries travelling in the Community for conducting scientific research with a view to facilitating proceedings carried out by Member States for issuing uniform short -stay visas.
- Persons invited by Parliament or the Estonian Government.
- Anyone who, by virtue of an international convention, is entitled to a visa free of charge. Representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organizations.
- Holders of diplomatic and service passports
- According to Visa Facilitation Agreements (http://www.vm.ee/en/taxonomy/term/161%20)
Please Note:
The applicable visa fee in CNY is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice. 

## Documents Required
Checklist for Individual Tourism (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/tBd9UBaMzIDh38kjJm6Z6/148f92221ad908d4f0643dc1a0250b08/Checklist-for-Individual-Tourism.pdf)
                                                                    
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/est/travel-insurance)

## Photo Specifications
All photos must meet the requirements listed below. If these requirements have not been met, the applicant will have to deliver a new photo that meets the requirements. The photo requirements are the same for children as for adults.

## The Photo shall:
- be in sharp focus, clear and with good contrasts
- be printed on quality photo paper with high solution
- be in colours with a light background
- be 35-45 mm in width
- maximum 6 months old, resemble the applicant
- full-face, facing the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- show the whole head and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80 % of the picture
- show open eyes that are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes

## Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot be coloured
- the rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be reflection in the glasses

## Regarding head-dress:
Religious head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly shown.
- Chin, forehead and both cheeks shall all be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face due to the head-dress are not allowed

## Processing Time
Normally，processing time for visa applications is within 15 calendar days (delivery time should be deducted), if the submitting date is less than 15 days before the date of departure,
                                                                        the applicant (except with the invitation or note from Chinese Embassy) should submit the reservation of flight.

## Download Forms
Authorization letter (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2CGEnui8ZM7gCoS7PJzcEl/2ddc5c2d53b979d8538de5c141ffeaef/AuthorisationLetter.pdf)
- According to the Personal Information Protection Law of the People’s Republic of China and other applicable laws and regulations to protect your personal information, VFS Global must obtain the consent from you for the processing of your personal data and proceed with your visa application. Please download, print, fill, sign and submit the consent form along with your visa application form, without which we will not be able to proceed with the application lodgment. Click
here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/est/apply-visa)

## To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
